{% macro nav_tree(docs_section, current_page=false) %} {% set active_group = "Start" %} {% if current_page %} {% set active_group = current_page.extra.group | default(value="Start") %} {% endif %}
{% for group in config.extra.nav_groups %}
{{ group }}
{% for doc_page in docs_section.pages %} {% set page_group = doc_page.extra.group | default(value="") %} {% if page_group == group %} {% set is_current = current_page and doc_page.permalink == current_page.permalink %} {{ doc_page.title }} {% if is_current and current_page.toc %}
{% for heading in current_page.toc %} {% if heading.level == 2 %} {% if heading.children %}
{{ heading.title }}
{% for child in heading.children %} {{ child.title }} {% endfor %}
{% else %} {{ heading.title }} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endmacro nav_tree %} {% macro toc_nav(docs_section, current_page=false) %}
{{ self::nav_tree(docs_section=docs_section, current_page=current_page) }}
{% endmacro toc_nav %}
